## Checklist

- [ ] Package builds (`python3 -m build --sdist --wheel`)
- [ ] Package metadata passes (`python3 -m twine check dist/*`)

- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (if behavior changed)

- [ ] Offline enforcement preserved (no network calls at runtime)
